stages.concept:
# Unit 124: 목적격 관계대명사 who(whom), which - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **목적격 관계대명사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> The man **(whom)** I met yesterday is a teacher.
> 내가 어제 만난 남자는 선생님이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적격 관계대명사**는 관계절에서 **목적어** 역할을 해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **who(m)** — 선행사가 **사람**일 때

> The girl **(whom/who)** I like is kind.
> 내가 좋아하는 소녀는 친절하다.

> She is the person **(whom/who)** I called yesterday.
> 그녀는 내가 어제 전화한 사람이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **which** — 선행사가 **사물/동물**일 때

> The book **(which)** I read was interesting.
> 내가 읽은 책은 재미있었다.

> This is the movie **(which)** I watched last night.
> 이것은 내가 어젯밤에 본 영화이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 목적격 관계대명사는 **생략 가능**해요!

> The man ~~whom~~ I met → The man I met ✅
> The book ~~which~~ I read → The book I read ✅

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"The girl (       ) I invited to the party didn't come."
1. who
2. which
3. whom ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요.
선행사가 사람(The girl)이고, 뒷문장에서 I invited (누구를) 자리가 비어있으므로 목적어 역할을 하는 whom 또는 who가 올 수 있어요.
그리고 이 목적격 관계대명사는 언제든지 생략할 수 있다는 점을 꼭 알아두세요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **that**도 사람/사물 모두 가능하고 역시 생략 가능!

🧑‍🎓 학생: 목적격은 who(m)/which/that이고 생략 가능! 주격은 생략 불가! 이 차이를 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 124: 목적격 관계대명사 who(whom), which - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She met a boy she taught at school.
빈칸에 알맞은 관계대명사는?
> **정답** who(m)

---

**02.** The book ? I read yesterday was interesting.
> **정답** which

---

**03.** The man ? she likes is tall.
> **정답** who(m)

---

**04.** The movie ? we watched was funny.
> **정답** which

---

**05.** The girl ? I met at the party is kind.
> **정답** who(m)

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The man which I met was kind.
(사람 선행사)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → who(m)

---

**07.** The book who I read was interesting.
(사물 선행사)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → which

---

**08.** The girl which I like is pretty.
(사람 선행사)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → who(m)

---

**09.** The pen who I bought is blue.
(사물 선행사)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → which

---

**10.** The teacher which we respect is kind.
(사람 선행사)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → who(m)

---

**11.** 두 문장을 관계대명사를 사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
I met a boy. She likes him.
> **정답** I met a boy who(m) she likes.

---

**12.** She read a book. I recommended it.
> **정답** She read a book which I recommended.

---

**13.** The man is a teacher. I saw him yesterday.
> **정답** The man who(m) I saw yesterday is a teacher.

---

**14.** I ate a cake. My mom made it.
> **정답** I ate a cake which my mom made.

---

**15.** The girl is kind. We met her at the park.
> **정답** The girl who(m) we met at the park is kind.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
내가 만난 소년은 친절했다.
The boy whom met I was kind
> **정답** The / boy / whom / I / met / was / kind

---

**17.** 내가 읽은 책은 재미있었다.
The book which read I was interesting
> **정답** The / book / which / I / read / was / interesting

---

**18.** 그녀가 좋아하는 남자는 키가 크다.
The man whom likes she is tall
> **정답** The / man / whom / she / likes / is / tall

---

**19.** 우리가 본 영화는 재미있었다.
The movie which watched we was fun
> **정답** The / movie / which / we / watched / was / fun

---

**20.** 내가 산 펜은 파란색이다.
The pen which bought I is blue
> **정답** The / pen / which / I / bought / is / blue
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 124: 목적격 관계대명사 who(whom), which - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
I met the woman _________________ I once hated
very much.
To her, I may be the girl _____________ she never
wanted to see again.
whom
whose
which
who
> **정답** who, whom

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
The teacher read the paper __________________
Tom worked on for two weeks.
The teacher put a cross on a mistake
_______________ Tom forgot to correct.
who
whom
which
whose
> **정답** which

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy met the professor ________________ she
respected.
Amy discussed the project ________________ she
was working on.
whose - which
who - who
which - whom
whom - which
> **정답** whom - which

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The librarian _____________ I wanted to see wasn't
in the library.
So, I talked to another library staff ______________ I
knew well.
which - who
whose - whom
who - whom
that - whose
• librarian 도서관 사서
> **정답** who - whom

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
Let's go to a restaurant which sells Indian
food.
I stayed at the hotel which my friend
recommended.
Tom's story which was a little bit sad made
me cry.
Tom is watching a movie which has no title.
> **정답** I stayed at the hotel which my friend recommended.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
The letter which Tom wrote was not mailed.
The song which I downloaded was very
touching.
Tom shouted at a kid who tried to steal his cell
phone.
I lost my wallet which my mother got me.
> **정답** Tom shouted at a kid who tried to steal his cell phone.

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy read a book which I picked especially for
her.
The woman paid the bill whom she didn't
owe.
I saw the cat which you were looking for.
He drives a white car which his mom bought
for him.
• bill 청구서, 계산서
> **정답** The woman paid the bill whom she didn't owe.

---

**08.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략 가능한 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
I will not forget the people whom I met during
the trip.
Their children who are on the same soccer
team eat almost everything.
The owner of the restaurant who cooks every
food on the menu is kind.
The pictures which the boy posted on the SNS
got a lot of likes.
• likes SNS에서 좋아요 표시
> **정답** The pictures which the boy posted on the SNS got a lot of likes.
> **정답I will not forget the people whom I met during the trip.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 Amy가 그날 입고 있던 드레스를 기억하니?
Do you remember the dress whom Amy was
wearing that day?
Do you remember the dress whose Amy was
wearing that day?
Do you remember the dress which Amy was
wearing that day?
Do you remember the dress which was
wearing that day?
> **정답** Do you remember the dress which Amy was wearing that day?

---

**10.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Is this the cake?
Tom and Amy made it together.
Is this the cake whom Tom and Amy who
made together?
Is this the cake which Tom and Amy made
together?
Is this the cake who Tom and Amy who made
together?
Is this the cake which Tom and Amy made it
together?
> **정답** Is this the cake which Tom and Amy made together?

---

**11.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 영작한 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
I met my English teacher.
I have always respected her.
I met my English teacher which I have always
respected.
I met my English teacher who I have always
respected.
I met my English teacher whom I have always
respected.
I met my English teacher whom I have always
respected her.
> **정답** I met my English teacher whom I have always respected., I met my English teacher who I have always respected.

---

**12.** 다음 문장 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy has enough books whom she can lend to
her friends.
My brother was watching a movie which I've
already watched three times.
I love food which my mother makes.
Amy shook hands with her client whom she
doesn't know well.
> **정답** Amy has enough books whom she can lend to her friends.

---

**13.** 다음 문장 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He ordered a hamburger which he eats
regularly.
I went to the concert which I enjoyed so much.
Amy lost her watch which she got it on her
birthday.
I drink apple juice which my mom makes
every morning.
> **정답** Amy lost her watch which she got it on her birthday.

---

**14.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
Here is the book which you lent me.
The man who I saw on the bus is my neighbor.
I talked to the girl who was sitting next to me.
She sang a song which she only knew.
> **정답** I talked to the girl who was sitting next to me.

---

**15.** 다음 문장 중 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
The people who has three cars live next to me.
My grandfather is a person who I admire the
most.
This is the new book which I bought it.
He was the one who first thought about the
idea.
> **정답** He was the one who first thought about the idea., My grandfather is a person who I admire the most.

---

**16.** 다음 문장 중 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
The coat which I gave to Tom was too small
for me.
The couple who I invited them to dinner at my
home were an hour late.
Everything I threw away was not precious to
me.
The person whom will visit me tonight is my
cousin.
> **정답** Everything I threw away was not precious to me., The coat which I gave to Tom was too small for me.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하세요.
The woman whom you met
her at the park is my
English teacher.
> **정답** her

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하세요.
The book which I bought it
at the bookstore was expensive.
> **정답** it

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개] (관계대명사 that 제외)
It was Sunday afternoon. My sister and I went to
the park. There were many people in the park.
We saw the children which was playing
football. Some people who we watched were
riding bicycles. Others were taking a walk around
the park. We ate sandwiches which my mom
made it .
> **정답** were, who were, who (whom), made

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개] (관계대명사 that 제외)
Tom fed his dog some chicken whom he
bought from a market. The next morning, his dog
got sick. Tom took the dog to a vet whom Tom
has known for 10 years. The vet said Tom had fed
the dog wrong food who can hurt the dog.
Later, a nurse who Tom has never seen came
and gave the dog a shot.
> **정답** which, whom, which, who
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 124 목적격 관계대명사 who(whom), which중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 관계대명사를 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오. (관계대명사 that 사용하지 않음)
Amy의 강아지는 종종 그녀가 요리한 당근을 먹는다.
[cook]
Amy's dog often eats carrots  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 which, she, cooks

---

**02.** 관계대명사를 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오. (관계대명사 that 사용하지 않음)
나는 Tom이 이야기하고 있는 여자를 본 적이 있다. [be,
talk]
I have seen the woman  (     )   (     )  
 with.
정답 who (whom), Tom, is, talking

---

**03.** 관계대명사를 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오. (관계대명사 that 사용하지 않음)
Jeff는 그가 그의 엄마에게서 들은 소식을 친구들에게 전달
했다. [hear]
Jeff delivered the news  (     )   (     )   (     )  from
his mom to his friends.
정답 which, he (Jeff), heard

---

**04.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 다시 쓰시오. (관계대명사
that 사용하지 않음)
The light bulb whom Edison invented is very
useful today.
→ The light bulb  (     )  is very useful
today.
정답 which Edison invented

---

**05.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 다시 쓰시오. (관계대명사
that 사용하지 않음)
They found the lady which they wanted to
interview.
→ They found the lady
.
정답 whom they wanted to interview (who they wanted to interview)
interview)

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
이것은 Amy가 만든 케익이다.
힌트 (     ) Amy, cake, the, which, made
This is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 the, cake, which, Amy, made

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
Baker 씨는 그가 심은 꽃들에 물을 주었다.
힌트 (     ) flowers, he, which, the, planted
Mr. Baker watered  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 the, flowers, which, he, planted

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
which/whom, everyone, like
A: Do you know the girl over there?
B: She is Helen. She is the girl  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 whom, everyone, likes

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
which/who, can't, solve
A: Why did Tom go to the teacher's office?
B: Tom had questions  (     )   (     )  
.
정답 which, he, couldn't, solve

---

**10.** 다음을 영작하시오. (관계대명사 that 사용하지 않음)
재희는 그녀가 기다렸던 영화를 봤다. [the movie,
expect]
Jaehee watched  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 the, movie, which, she, expected

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 124: 목적격 관계대명사 who - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I met the boy _________________ I once disliked very much.
To him, I may be the girl _____________ he never wanted to see again. whom whose which who
> 정답: who, whom

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
The teacher read the essay __________________ Amy worked on for two weeks.
The teacher put a circle around a mistake _______________ Amy forgot to fix. who whom which whose
> 정답: which

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom met the coach Park ________________ he admired.
Tom discussed the plan ________________ he was working on.
whose - which who - who which - whom whom - which
> 정답: whom - which

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The doctor _____________ I wanted to see wasn't in the clinic.
So, I talked to another nurse ______________ I knew well.
which - who whose - whom who - whom that - whose
> 정답: who - whom

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
Let's go to a café which sells herbal tea.
I visited the park which my friend recommended.
Amy's story which was a little bit funny made me laugh.
Tom is watching a film which has no subtitle.
> 정답: I visited the park which my friend recommended.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
The poem which Amy wrote was not published.
The music which I downloaded was very calming.
Tom shouted at a dog who tried to take his food.
I lost my hat which my father got me.
> 정답: Tom shouted at a dog who tried to take his food.

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy read a book which I chose especially for her.
The boy paid the fine whom he didn't owe.
I saw the dog which you were searching for.
She drives a red car which her dad bought for her.
> 정답: The boy paid the fine whom he didn't owe.

---

**08.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략 가능한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I will not forget the friends whom I met during the trip.
Their children who are on the same baseball team eat almost anything.
The owner of the shop who cooks every dish on the menu is generous.
The photos which the girl posted on the blog got a lot of likes. lot of views.
> 정답: The photos which the girl posted on the blog got a lot of likes.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너는 Amy가 그날 들고 있던 가방을 기억하니?
Do you remember the bag whom Amy was carrying that day?
Do you remember the bag whose Amy was carrying that day?
Do you remember the bag which Amy was carrying that day?
Do you remember the bag which was carrying that day?
> 정답: Do you remember the dress which Amy was wearing that day?

---

**10.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Is this the bread?
Tom and Amy baked it together.
Is this the bread whom Tom and Amy who baked together?
Is this the bread which Tom and Amy baked together?
Is this the bread who Tom and Amy who baked together?
Is this the bread which Tom and Amy baked it together?
> 정답: Is this the cake which Tom and Amy made together?

---

**11.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) I met my science teacher.
I have always admired her.
I met my science teacher which I have always admired.
I met my science teacher who I have always admired.
